question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: Huawei has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Xiaomi has the second-largest market share.
options.D: Others account for the largest share of the market.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (27%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Others is largest when relying on visual comparison.
